array.string: SOYEHT_DIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/SoyehtDev"; ENGINE_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR/engine"; export ADMIN_PORT="8902"; export ADDR="127.0.0.1:8902"; export THEYOS_HOUSEHOLD_PORT="8101"; export SOYEHT_SETUP_INVITATION_ALLOW_LAN="1"; export THEYOS_OWNER_AUTH_V2_ROLLOUT="reviewed-core-v2-secure-upgrade"; export THEYOS_SECURE_UPGRADE_APP_ATTEST_TEAM_ID="W7677A5BK2"; export THEYOS_SECURE_UPGRADE_APP_ATTEST_BUNDLE_ID="com.soyeht.app.dev"; export THEYOS_SECURE_UPGRADE_APP_ATTEST_ENVIRONMENT="development"; export THEYOS_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR"; export THEYOS_HOME="$SOYEHT_DIR"; export THEYOS_BIN_DIR="$ENGINE_DIR"; export THEYOS_SQLITE_DB="$SOYEHT_DIR/theyos.db"; export THEYOS_SESSION_DB="$SOYEHT_DIR/theyos-sessions.db"; export THEYOS_RATELIMIT_DB="$SOYEHT_DIR/ratelimit.db"; export THEYOS_CONVERSATIONS_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR/conversations"; export THEYOS_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN_PATH="$SOYEHT_DIR/bootstrap-token"; export THEYOS_VM_ASSETS_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR/vms"; export THEYOS_VM_STATE_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR/vms"; export THEYOS_SNAPSHOTS_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR/snapshots"; export THEYOS_VMRUNNER_SOCK="/tmp/soyehtdev-vmrunner-macos.sock"; export THEYOS_SKIP_LEGACY_MIGRATION="1"; export THEYOS_FORCE_SOFTWARE_KEYS="1"; export THEYOS_VMRUNNER_RS_BIN="$ENGINE_DIR/vmrunner_macos_ipc"; export THEYOS_STORE_RS_BIN="$ENGINE_DIR/store-ipc"; export THEYOS_TERMINAL_RS_BIN="$ENGINE_DIR/terminal-ipc"; export THEYOS_SSH_CTL="$ENGINE_DIR/theyos-ssh"; export CADDY_HTTP_PORT="8090"; export CADDY_HTTPS_PORT="8453"; export THEYOS_LLM_PROXY_URL="http://127.0.0.1:18901"; export THEYOS_APNS_KEY_PATH="$SOYEHT_DIR/apns.p8"; export THEYOS_APNS_KEY_ID="5FPYV735V4"; export THEYOS_APNS_TEAM_ID="W7677A5BK2"; export THEYOS_APNS_TOPIC="com.soyeht.app"; exec "$ENGINE_DIR/theyos-engine"
